stories.title: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle

sources.summary: Five tech giants have $1.65 trillion in data center obligations that are listed off their balance sheets. These liabilities are added as footnotes in their quarterly statements but will become due and payable once these data centers start operating.
sources.summary_zh: 五家科技巨头有 1.65 万亿美元的数据中心债务，这些债务已从其资产负债表中列出。这些负债作为脚注添加到季度报表中，但一旦这些数据中心开始运营，这些负债将到期应付。

stories.title: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded

sources.title: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
sources.title_en: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
sources.title_original: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
sources.summary: A new Bloomberg report is claiming that Apple is working on a leasing program called "Apple Upgrade" that will allow customers to finance hardware over the course of 2 or 3 years. At the end of the term, they can keep the device or hand it back, or even upgrade to a newer model if payments are completed early.
sources.summary_zh: 彭博社的一份新报告称，苹果正在开发一项名为“Apple Upgrade”的租赁计划，该计划将允许客户在 2 到 3 年内为硬件提供融资。期限结束时，他们可以保留设备或归还设备，如果提前完成付款，甚至可以升级到更新的型号。
